author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: MatmulBackward extended with broadcast_matmul_backward. Computes grad_A = matmul(grad_C, B^T) and grad_B = matmul(A^T, grad_C) with sum-reduction over broadcast dimensions. 3 new tests including numerical gradient checks for 3D×3D, 3D×2D broadcast, and 1-vs-N batch broadcast.
